Reference

§ 01Your Calendar Links

Dear {{sellerName}},

To keep the transaction on track, we need to establish a regular communication cadence. Please use the links below to schedule the following calls:

A.Kickoff Call (60 min). One-time call to review the transaction plan, answer your questions, and align on priorities. Please schedule within the next 5 business days.
{{kickoffCalendarUrl}}
B.Weekly Check-In (30 min). Recurring call every {{checkinDay}} at {{checkinTime}}. We'll review progress, address blockers, and plan the week ahead.
{{weeklyCalendarUrl}}
C.Gate Review (45 min). Scheduled before each gate clearance. We'll review gate requirements, confirm readiness, and address any gaps.
{{gateReviewCalendarUrl}}
§ 02What to Prepare for the Kickoff Call

To make the most of our 60 minutes, please come prepared with:

1.Your top 3 questions. What's most on your mind about this process?
2.Timeline expectations. Any hard deadlines, personal events, or business cycles we should plan around?
3.Post-close vision. What role do you want after closing? Full exit, advisory, continued employment?
4.Key concerns. Any specific worries — taxes, employee reaction, valuation, timeline?
§ 03Communication Preferences

Outside of scheduled calls, here's how to reach us:

deals@forhemit.com
Within 4 business hours
Call {{stewardshipLeadPhone}}
{{ref}}
Tip: Include {{ref}} in the subject line of all emails. This ensures your message is routed to the right team member immediately.
—Forhemit Transition Stewardship
Forhemit Transition Stewardship
California Public Benefit Corporation
